Read-only settlement chamber · unsigned proof intent · human review required

Interactive local chamber · no external authority

Run the proof cycle.
Stop at human review.

Compose a GoalOS mission in ordinary language. The chamber deterministically packages a public-safe intent, walks through the AGIJobManager settlement lifecycle, and exports an Evidence Docket. It never touches a wallet.

The proof package is ready for a human decision.
